name: routing_helper_call
description: GMAB value passed to a chkGmab()/getGmabRoute() style helper. This is a field-reference idiom the core field matcher cannot see (the column name is not in the statement), so it is added here as an experience-driven pattern.

name: prefix_compare_two_char
description: Two-character prefix comparison against the group member column, e.g. %SUBST(bkGMAB:1:2) = 'HB'. The column name has a 2-char variable prefix, so the regex matches [A-Z0-9]{2}GMAB. Captures the out-of-list prefix candidate for review.
